message:
Merge PR #1534: fix: revert shared-DB for untracked-beads rigs (breaks bead creation)

Reverts commit 36520966 which made rigs without tracked beads share the
HQ database. The shared-DB approach breaks bead creation because prefix
validation rejects rig-prefixed IDs against HQ configured issue_prefix.

Closes #1533

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1534
Author: julianknutsen
